$comment: DESIGN PROTOTYPE — not interpreted by any host. List widgets are expert-leaf territory in the catalog (data-bound collections render via documentCollection reads; row interactions commit layer ops through paged.mutate). This prototype records the intended binding surface only.

rows.$comment: Expert leaf: visibility toggle → layerSetVisible, lock → layerSetLocked, rename → layerSetName, reorder → layerMove. Scoped to the edit context's subtree once edit contexts exist (B-02).
